threats.title: Google's Android Apps Get Public Verification to Stop Supply Chain Attacks
threats.summary: Google has announced expanded Binary Transparency for Android as a way to safeguard the ecosystem from supply chain attacks. "This new public ledger ensures the Google apps on your device are exactly what we intended to build and distribute," Google's product and security teams said. The initiative builds upon the foundation of Pixel Binary Transparency, which Google introduced in October 2021

threats.title: Windows Phone Link Exploited by CloudZ RAT to Steal Credentials and OTPs
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of an intrusion that involved the use of a CloudZ remote access tool (RAT) and a previous undocumented plugin dubbed Pheno with the aim of facilitating credential theft. threats.title: Palo Alto PAN-OS Flaw Under Active Exploitation Enables Remote Code Execution
threats.summary: Palo Alto Networks has released an advisory warning that a critical buffer overflow vulnerability in its PAN-OS software has been exploited in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-0300, has been described as a case of unauthenticated remote code execution.
